title: astragalus olurensis
intro: Astragalus olurensis, also known as a species of legume, is a type of plant that belongs to the Astragalus genus. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus olurensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus olurensis is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be found in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
